_publications._publicationTitle: The ErbB inhibitors trastuzumab and erlotinib inhibit growth of vestibular schwannoma xenografts in nude mice: a preliminary study.

_contextSnippet: This section was taken from the edge of the graft to illustrate the specificity of S100 immunolabeling for viable tumor cells compared with the cells comprising the tumor capsule that fail to label with anti-S100 antibody
details: Specifically labeled viable tumor cells compared to tumor capsule cells that failed to label, demonstrating specificity for Schwann cells
